response:
```sql
SELECT c.name
FROM conductor c
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT conductor_id, COUNT(DISTINCT orchestra_id) AS orchestra_count
    FROM performance
    GROUP BY conductor_id
) AS conductor_stats ON c.conductor_id = conductor_stats.conductor_id
WHERE conductor_stats.orchestra_count = (
    SELECT MAX(total_orchestras)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT orchestra_id) AS total_orchestras
        FROM performance
        GROUP BY conductor_id
    ) AS sub_counts
);
```
